data.name: Fetish Love: NSFW Dating Sim
data.detailed_description:
🔍 THE MYSTERY AWAITS

You're a journalism student working on your final project.

What starts as a simple investigation into campus rumors becomes

something far more dangerous: a blackmail case targeting students.

But you're not alone in this investigation. Four incredible girls

will help you uncover the truth... and perhaps discover something

deeper along the way.

💕 FOUR GIRLS, FOUR STORIES

🌸 RINA - The Confident Tsundere

Bold, playful, and hiding secrets beneath her confident smile.

She claims she doesn't care about you... but her actions say otherwise.

💙 KIRA - The Analytical Partner

Your brilliant partner in the investigation. She analyzes everything

with scientific precision... except her growing feelings for you.

☕ SOPHIE - The Playful Barista

Sweet, flirty, and full of surprises. Your visits to the café will

never be purely professional again.

🎭 MILA - The Mysterious Professor

Elegant, enigmatic, and strangely connected to the case. She sees

right through you... and likes what she sees.

🎮 GAMEPLAY FEATURES

INVESTIGATION SYSTEM

- Interview suspects and analyze evidence

- Your deduction skills determine the outcome

- Multiple paths to solve the mystery

RELATIONSHIP DYNAMICS

- Build Trust, Affection, and Intimacy with each girl

- Every choice affects your relationships

- Balance professionalism with personal desires

- Your personality (Gentleman vs Pervert) shapes interactions

🔥 MATURE CONTENT

This is an 18+ visual novel exploring adult themes, sexuality,

and diverse fetishes in a consensual, sex-positive context.

WHAT TO EXPECT:

✅ Explicit sexual content and nudity

✅ Diverse fetishes (exhibitionism, femdom, power play, chastity, cuckold)

✅ Intimate scenes earned through relationship building

🎭 A STORY ABOUT MORE THAN SEX

While Fetish Love doesn't shy away from explicit content, at its

core is a narrative about:

- The difference between consensual kink and abuse

- Self-discovery and accepting your desires

- Trust, vulnerability, and genuine connection

- Solving a mystery while confronting your own secrets

Through Mila's storyline, the game explores how healthy BDSM

relationships differ from manipulation and control.

This is erotica with substance. Porn with purpose.

🎯 FOR FANS OF:

- Detective Visual Novels

- Dating Sims with meaningful choices

- Adult games with actual plot

- Character-driven narratives

- Anime-style art and storytelling

🆓 TRY THE FREE DEMO!

Experience the opening of the mystery and meet all four girls

in our FREE demo available now!

💌 FROM THE DEVELOPER

"Fetish Love is my first game - a solo development passion project.

I wanted to create an adult VN that treats players like adults:

with complex characters, meaningful choices, and sex that feels

earned rather than gratuitous.

Thank you for your support!"

— PinkRoom Games

📅 RELEASE: MARCH 2026

🔞 AGES 18+ ONLY

This game is intended for mature audiences (18+) and includes sexual themes, adult language, and LGBTQ+ relationships. All characters are consenting adults.

data.short_description: A detective visual novel where you investigate a university blackmail case while romancing four unique girls. Your choices shape the mystery AND the relationships. Multiple endings. Alternative romance stories. Can you uncover the truth... and their hearts?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 法文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Dual-Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible with DirectX 9/OpenGL 2.0+
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual-Core
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible with OpenGL 2.0+
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04+, SteamOS, or compatible (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Dual-Core
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0+ compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04+, SteamOS, or compatible (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual-Core or better
  • 記憶體: 4096 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0+ compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/10/11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz Dual-Core
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Compatible with DirectX 9/OpenGL 2.0+
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Dual-Core
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Compatible with OpenGL 2.0+
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 18.04+, SteamOS, or compatible (64-bit)
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz Dual-Core
  • Memory: 2048 MB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0+ compatible
  • Storage: 2048 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
linux_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Ubuntu 20.04+, SteamOS, or compatible (64-bit)
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Dual-Core or better
  • Memory: 4096 MB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0+ compatible
  • Storage: 2048 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
